intent: Two-screen bilingual (DE and EN) login mask: identical structure on both screens but with all labels and validation rule strings localized; explicit locale-switch buttons cross-link the screens.
notes: Tier-3 banking adversarial (locale stress for cross-modal faithfulness): the same logical fields appear on both screens with localized text, localized SELECT_FIELD options and localized validation rule strings (Pflichtfeld vs Required, Numerisch vs Numeric). The harness must NOT collapse the two locales into one fixture and must NOT translate validation rules through the generator (rubric forbids inventing rules). Locale-switch buttons add four navigation edges that the multi-screen test-case enumerator should recognize as inverse pairs.
